sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Character Selection
special_mechanics.description: Four playable characters with different movement profiles: Toad (fastest speed/strength, lowest jump), Luigi (highest jump, slower movement, weaker strength), Princess Toadstool (can float for short distances, lowest speed/strength), Mario (intermediate all stats)

special_mechanics.name: Vertical Scrolling
special_mechanics.description: Game can scroll vertically in some areas in addition to standard left-right horizontal scrolling

special_mechanics.name: Climbing
special_mechanics.description: All characters can climb ladders or vines

special_mechanics.name: Object Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Characters can lift and throw objects (vegetables, mushroom blocks, enemies) to defeat enemies instead of jumping on them

special_mechanics.name: Sub-space Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Magic potions create temporary access to Sub-space, a reflected unscrollable area for collecting coins and mushrooms

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Game lacks documented numerical physics parameters in available sources. Character movement differences are qualitatively described but not quantified. Sources provide gameplay mechanics overview rather than technical physics specifications.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Yume Koujou: Doki Doki Panic
